cases.input: Humanise: 'In today's fast-paced world, we leverage cutting-edge AI to navigate the complexities of modern business and unleash growth.'
cases.rubric: Every banned phrase removed; the underlying claim (AI helps with growth) is preserved or honestly downgraded.

cases.input: Humanise a paragraph of five 18-word sentences without changing the meaning.
cases.rubric: Resulting paragraph mixes short and long; reads aloud naturally.

cases.input: Humanise: 'The product is fast — it ships in two days — and customers love it.'
cases.rubric: Em-dashes replaced with commas, parentheses, or full stops; reads naturally without the dash tic.
